title: clerodendrum adenophysum
intro: Clerodendrum adenophysum, also known as the cat's whisker or tropical cat's whisker, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum adenophysum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Clerodendrum adenophysum is often prepared for medicinal use in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
